page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz, with 1 thread per core. The memory configuration consists of 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier for most compute and memory tasks, with a few notable strengths. The Passmark memory score is strong, placing in the top 25% with a score of 2769.96. In contrast, CPU-bound benchmarks such as the stress-ng single-core (1579.79) and multi-core (16667.55) tests fall within the average range. Large-block memory read bandwidth reaches 88.47 GB/sec, while write bandwidth is measured at 51.39 GB/sec. For database operations, the server handles 16.27 million Redis SET operations per second and achieves a Passmark database score of 6312.27.

The instance offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads, providing dedicated compute resources without the overhead of hyperthreading. However, the lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage attachment, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the storage tier selected. The server is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring consistent, non-shared CPU performance and strong memory access speeds without needing GPU acceleration. It is appropriate for applications such as static web serving, software compilation, text processing, and small-scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.4xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a 3.3 GHz clock speed, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core). Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps but does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data shows average CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 16667.55, alongside strong memory performance, indicated by a Passmark memory score in the top 25%. The server is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU resources. It is appropriate for general-purpose applications, including static web serving, database operations, software compilation, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.4xlarge is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong memory performance for general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 16-core x86_64 server with balanced memory performance, designed for consistent general-purpose compute workloads without hyperthreading.

64.0 GB of RAM providing 4.0 GB per core
Strong memory performance ranking in the top 25% of benchmarks
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Appropriate for web serving, database operations, and software compilation
